name: Parent Status Validation
description: Validate child record based on parent record status or type
errorMessage: Cannot proceed because [PARENT_LABEL] [STATUS_FIELD_LABEL] is not [REQUIRED_STATUS]. Please update the [PARENT_LABEL] first.

STATUS_FIELD.description: Status or type field on parent

examples.name: Opportunity Requires Customer Account
examples.errorMessage: Cannot create Opportunity because Account Type is not Customer. Please convert Account to Customer first.

examples.name: Quote Requires Active Account
examples.useCase: Require account to be active before creating quote
examples.errorMessage: Cannot create Quote because Account Status is not Active.

examples.name: Case Requires Approved Contact
examples.useCase: Require contact approval before case creation
examples.errorMessage: Cannot create Case because Contact is not approved.

testCases.name: Should fail validation (parent exists, wrong status)
testCases.errorMessage: Cannot create Opportunity because Account Type is not Customer.

testCases.name: Should pass validation (parent exists, correct status)
Should pass validation (no parent)
testCases.note: Null parent is allowed (rule only validates IF parent exists)

variations.name: Multiple Valid Parent Statuses
variations.description: Allow any of several parent statuses

variations.name: Parent Status with Additional Field Check
variations.description: Check parent status AND another field

variations.name: Parent Status with Record Type
variations.description: Only validate for specific record types

bestPractices: ALWAYS null-check parent relationship BEFORE accessing parent fields
Use TEXT() for picklist fields on parent
Provide clear action in error message (what user should do)
Test with records that have null parents
Consider whether to allow null parents or require parent first
commonPitfalls: Forgetting to null-check parent (causes null pointer error)
Using ISPICKVAL on parent picklist fields (doesn't work cross-object)
Not using TEXT() for parent picklist comparisons
Error message doesn't explain how to fix issue

deploymentConsiderations.impactAnalysis: Query child records with invalid parent status
deploymentConsiderations.rolloutStrategy: Fix parent records before activating rule
deploymentConsiderations.dataCleanup: Update parent records to required status

maintenance.dependencies: Parent object field must exist and be accessible

performanceConsiderations.optimization: Consider denormalizing parent status if performance issue
performanceConsiderations.bulkOperations: Test with 1000+ records to verify performance

author: Salesforce Plugin Team
